title: The Volcano That Refused to Erupt

all.en: Wei-cheng had been planning his science fair project for two whole months in advance.
all.zh: 偉誠已經提前兩個月在計畫他的科展作品了。

all.en: He decided to build a working model volcano that could simulate a real eruption.
all.zh: 他決定做一個能模擬真實噴發的火山運作模型。

all.en: His partner, Hsiao-min, was great with chemistry but terrible at gluing things together.
all.zh: 他的搭檔曉敏化學很強，但動手黏東西卻很糟糕。

all.en: They borrowed a thick textbook from the library to research different chemical reactions.
all.zh: 他們從圖書館借了一本厚厚的教科書，研究不同的化學反應。

all.en: Their first plan was to use baking soda and vinegar like every elementary student.
all.zh: 他們最初的計畫是像每個小學生一樣使用小蘇打和醋。

all.en: But Wei-cheng wanted something more dramatic, with smoke, color, and a louder rumble.
all.zh: 但偉誠想要更戲劇化的效果，要有煙、顏色和更大的隆隆聲。

all.en: After many tests, they chose a safer recipe using yeast, hydrogen peroxide, and dish soap.
all.zh: 經過多次測試，他們選了一個較安全的配方，使用酵母、雙氧水和洗碗精。

all.en: Building the cone took an entire weekend of cutting cardboard and shaping wet paper.
all.zh: 做圓錐花了整個週末來剪紙板和塑形濕紙。

all.en: Painting the volcano realistic shades of brown and red took even longer than expected.
all.zh: 把火山漆成逼真的棕色和紅色花的時間比預期還久。

all.en: Three days before the fair, they conducted their first full practice run at school.
all.zh: 科展前三天，他們在學校進行了第一次完整的預演。

all.en: To their horror, only a sad bubble dribbled weakly down the side of the cone.
all.zh: 令他們驚恐的是，只有一個可憐的泡泡虛弱地沿著圓錐側面滴下來。

all.en: Hsiao-min felt embarrassed and started to wonder if they should pick another project.
all.zh: 曉敏感到難堪，開始懷疑他們是否該換一個題目。

all.en: Wei-cheng refused to quit and insisted they could find the problem with careful thinking.
all.zh: 偉誠拒絕放棄，堅持只要仔細思考就能找出問題。

all.en: Their chemistry teacher suggested measuring temperature and concentration much more precisely.
all.zh: 他們的化學老師建議更精確地測量溫度和濃度。

all.en: She lent them a small electronic scale and a set of clean measuring cylinders.
all.zh: 她借給他們一個小型電子秤和一組乾淨的量筒。

all.en: That night, the pair stayed in the lab until eight, recording every single attempt.
all.zh: 那天晚上，兩人在實驗室待到八點，記錄每一次的嘗試。

all.en: They noticed that warm water made the reaction nearly three times faster and stronger.
all.zh: 他們注意到溫水能讓反應快將近三倍且更劇烈。

all.en: On the second-to-last day, they finally produced a tall, foamy, satisfying eruption.
all.zh: 在倒數第二天，他們終於做出又高又泡沫滿滿、令人滿意的噴發。

all.en: However, the next morning, the volcano cracked badly when they tried to move it.
all.zh: 然而隔天早上，他們搬動火山時，它裂得很嚴重。

all.en: Wei-cheng nearly cried, but Hsiao-min grabbed hot glue and started repairing it immediately.
all.zh: 偉誠差點哭出來，但曉敏抓起熱熔膠立刻開始修補。

all.en: They worked through lunch, sharing one rice ball between them and not saying a word.
all.zh: 他們連午餐都沒吃，兩人分著一顆飯糰，一句話也沒說。

all.en: By the afternoon, the volcano looked even better than before, with extra texture and detail.
all.zh: 到了下午，火山看起來比之前更好，多了額外的質感與細節。

all.en: On the day of the fair, the school gym buzzed with proud parents and nervous students.
all.zh: 科展當天，學校體育館擠滿了驕傲的家長和緊張的學生。

all.en: Judges in white coats walked from booth to booth with serious expressions and clipboards.
all.zh: 穿著白袍的評審帶著嚴肅的表情和寫字夾，一個攤位接一個地走過。

all.en: When their turn came, Wei-cheng confidently explained the chemistry behind the reaction.
all.zh: 輪到他們時，偉誠自信地說明了反應背後的化學原理。

all.en: Hsiao-min poured the mixture in carefully, glancing at her partner with quiet hope.
all.zh: 曉敏小心地倒入混合物，悄悄地帶著希望瞥了搭檔一眼。

all.en: For five long seconds, absolutely nothing happened, and the audience held its breath.
all.zh: 在漫長的五秒鐘裡，什麼也沒發生，觀眾屏住了呼吸。

all.en: Then orange foam burst upward, flowing over the cone like real molten lava.
all.zh: 接著橘色泡沫向上爆發，像真正的熔岩般流過圓錐。

all.en: The crowd clapped and a small child in the front gasped with wide, shining eyes.
all.zh: 群眾鼓掌，前排一個小孩睜大發亮的眼睛驚呼出聲。

all.en: One judge nodded slowly and wrote several careful notes on her white evaluation sheet.
all.zh: 一位評審緩緩點頭，在她白色的評分表上仔細寫了幾筆。

all.en: Two hours later, the principal announced the results over the gym's loudspeaker.
all.zh: 兩小時後，校長透過體育館的擴音器宣布結果。

all.en: Wei-cheng and Hsiao-min won second place in the entire junior high category.
all.zh: 偉誠和曉敏贏得了整個國中組的第二名。

all.en: They hugged briefly, then quickly stepped apart, both blushing in front of their classmates.
all.zh: 他們短暫地擁抱，又迅速分開，在同學面前兩人都臉紅了。

all.en: Walking home together, they already started brainstorming ideas for next year's project.
all.zh: 一起走回家時，他們已經開始為明年的作品集思廣益了。

all.en: Wei-cheng smiled and thought that failure had honestly been the best teacher all along.
all.zh: 偉誠微笑著想，老實說失敗一直都是最好的老師。

all.en: Over winter break, the two friends visited a real geological museum in the southern city of Tainan.
all.zh: 寒假期間，兩個朋友參觀了南部臺南市的一間真正的地質博物館。

all.en: They marveled at glass cases full of cooled lava samples and ancient volcanic rocks.
all.zh: 他們驚嘆於玻璃櫃裡滿是冷卻熔岩樣本和古老火山岩。

all.en: A retired volcanologist gave a free lecture, and they sat in the very front row.
all.zh: 一位退休的火山學家舉辦免費講座，他們就坐在最前排。

all.en: After the talk, Wei-cheng asked so many questions that the lecturer offered him a name card.
all.zh: 演講結束後，偉誠問了很多問題，講師甚至給了他一張名片。

all.en: Hsiao-min sketched detailed cross-sections of magma chambers throughout her thick blue notebook.
all.zh: 曉敏在她厚厚的藍色筆記本中畫滿了岩漿庫的詳細剖面圖。

all.en: Back home, they began drafting their next project: a model of plate tectonics in motion.
all.zh: 回到家後，他們開始構思下一個作品：板塊構造運動模型。

all.en: Wei-cheng suggested using motors and rubber sheets to simulate slow continental drift.
all.zh: 偉誠建議使用馬達和橡膠片來模擬緩慢的大陸漂移。

all.en: Hsiao-min designed clever colored layers to show different temperatures inside the earth.
all.zh: 曉敏設計了巧妙的彩色分層，顯示地球內部的不同溫度。

all.en: Their teacher heard about the plan and offered to be their official advisor again.
all.zh: 老師聽說了這個計畫，主動表示願意再次擔任他們的正式指導老師。

all.en: Walking out of school that day, they both felt science was a friendship that never ended.
all.zh: 那天走出校門時，他們都覺得科學是一段永不結束的友誼。

all.en: Over the next few months, they ordered small motors and rubber sheets from an online supplier.
all.zh: 在接下來的幾個月裡，他們從網路供應商那裡訂購了小馬達和橡膠片。

all.en: Hsiao-min painted detailed continents onto the moving rubber surface using temperature-sensitive ink.
all.zh: 曉敏用感溫油墨在會移動的橡膠表面上畫出細緻的大陸板塊。

all.en: When warmed, the colors shifted slowly, mimicking the gradual heating of the Earth's mantle.
all.zh: 受熱時，顏色會緩慢變化，模擬地球地函逐漸升溫的過程。

all.en: Wei-cheng programmed a tiny microcontroller to control the motor speeds with great precision.
all.zh: 偉誠寫程式控制一個小型微控器，精準地調節馬達的轉速。

all.en: Their teacher invited a visiting geology professor to review the model before the science fair.
all.zh: 他們的老師邀請了一位來訪的地質學教授，在科展前審閱他們的模型。

all.en: The professor offered detailed corrections and suggested adding a clear acrylic cover for protection.
all.zh: 教授提供了詳細的修正建議，並提議加上一個透明壓克力罩來保護模型。

all.en: On fair day, their booth was crowded with curious visitors from kindergarten through high school.
all.zh: 科展當天，他們的攤位擠滿了從幼稚園到高中的好奇參觀者。

all.en: A judge from the national academy spent fifteen minutes asking deep technical questions about geology.
all.zh: 一位來自國家科學院的評審花了十五分鐘問了許多深入的地質學技術問題。

all.en: Three weeks later, they received an invitation to present at the national junior science conference.
all.zh: 三週後，他們收到邀請，要在全國少年科學會議上發表他們的作品。

all.en: Standing on that bigger stage, Wei-cheng and Hsiao-min realized science had opened doors they never imagined.
all.zh: 站在那更大的舞台上，偉誠和曉敏明白科學為他們開啟了從未想過的大門。

all.en: After the conference, a famous geology professor offered them weekend mentoring at his university lab.
all.zh: 會議結束後，一位知名地質學教授提議在他的大學實驗室為他們進行週末指導。

all.en: Every Saturday, they took the early train into the city carrying lunchboxes packed by Hsiao-min's mother.
all.zh: 每個星期六，他們搭早班火車進城，帶著曉敏媽媽親手做的便當。

all.en: The professor taught them how to use real seismic data downloaded from a national monitoring network.
all.zh: 教授教他們如何使用從國家監測網路下載的真實地震資料。

all.en: Wei-cheng wrote his first short academic paper, with Hsiao-min creating clear infographics for the figures.
all.zh: 偉誠寫了他第一篇短篇學術論文，曉敏則為圖表製作了清楚的資訊圖像。

all.en: Their paper was accepted by a youth science journal and reprinted in a national student magazine.
all.zh: 他們的論文被一本青少年科學期刊接受，並被一本全國學生雜誌轉載。

all.en: Several younger students asked Wei-cheng to teach them how to start a science club at their schools.
all.zh: 幾位年紀較小的學生請偉誠教他們如何在自己的學校創立科學社團。

all.en: He drafted a simple starter guide and shared it for free with any teacher who requested a copy.
all.zh: 他草擬了一份簡單的入門指南，免費分享給任何來索取的老師。

all.en: Hsiao-min started a small podcast where she interviewed young female scientists about their daily routines.
all.zh: 曉敏開設了一個小型 Podcast，採訪年輕女性科學家的日常生活作息。

all.en: Wei-cheng listened to every episode while studying for his entrance exams late at night.
all.zh: 偉誠在深夜準備入學考時，把每一集都聽過了。

all.en: On graduation day, the two friends sat side by side and promised to keep doing science together.
all.zh: 畢業那天，兩位朋友肩並肩坐著，相約一起繼續做科學。
